# Harmony React Components

> Harmony is Deltek's design system. This file documents the React component library converted from the Harmony Astro design system. Use these components with Harmony CSS tokens and themes (theme-cp, theme-vp, theme-ppm, theme-maconomy) with light and dark modes.

Important notes:
- All components use Harmony CSS custom properties (tokens). Do not resolve to hardcoded values.
- All components use BEM class naming. Do not rename classes.
- Themes are applied via HTML class (e.g. `html.theme-cp`). Dark mode via `html.theme-cp dark`.
- CSS import order: reset.css → tokens.css → global.css → components.css.

## Components

- [Accordion](./llms/Accordion.md): Expandable sections that reveal content when a header is clicked; supports single or multiple open panels.
- [Alert](./llms/Alert.md): Dismissible feedback message with optional title, icon, primary/secondary actions, and progress bar.
- [Avatar](./llms/Avatar.md): User or entity thumbnail image with optional fallback and size presets.
- [Badge](./llms/Badge.md): Small label or count indicator with variant and size options.
- [Button](./llms/Button.md): Primary action control with variant and size; can render as button or link.
- [ButtonGroup](./llms/ButtonGroup.md): Group of buttons with shared variant, size, and orientation.
- [Card](./llms/Card.md): Content container with optional header (title/subtitle), body, and footer; supports elevated and interactive styles.
- [Checkbox](./llms/Checkbox.md): Single checkbox control bound to a boolean value.
- [CheckboxGroup](./llms/CheckboxGroup.md): Group of checkboxes with a legend and optional error/warning message.
- [Chip](./llms/Chip.md): Compact tag or status pill with variant, size, and optional overflow count.
- [DateInput](./llms/DateInput.md): Native date/time input with type (date, time, datetime-local, month, week).
- [DatePicker](./llms/DatePicker.md): Calendar-style date picker with min/max and value.
- [DateTimePicker](./llms/DateTimePicker.md): Combined date and time picker.
- [Dialog](./llms/Dialog.md): Modal overlay with title, body content, and optional footer actions.
- [Dropdown](./llms/Dropdown.md): Select-style dropdown with options and placeholder.
- [FloatingNav](./llms/FloatingNav.md): Floating navigation with optional execute/save and custom actions.
- [Icon](./llms/Icon.md): Icon from design system with name, variant, and size.
- [Input](./llms/Input.md): Text input with optional label, icon, error state, and validation.
- [Kanban](./llms/Kanban.md): Kanban board with columns and optional title/action buttons.
- [KanbanCard](./llms/KanbanCard.md): Card item within a Kanban column with title and description.
- [Label](./llms/Label.md): Form label with optional required indicator and helper text.
- [Link](./llms/Link.md): Text or inline link with optional external and muted styling.
- [ListMenu](./llms/ListMenu.md): List of menu items with optional borders and click handler.
- [MonthPicker](./llms/MonthPicker.md): Month-only picker with value and min/max.
- [NotificationBadge](./llms/NotificationBadge.md): Badge showing a count or status (e.g. errors) with variant and size.
- [NumberInput](./llms/NumberInput.md): Numeric input with optional min, max, and step.
- [PickerPopup](./llms/PickerPopup.md): Popover wrapper for a picker with trigger and title.
- [ProgressBar](./llms/ProgressBar.md): Progress indicator with variant, size, value, max, and optional label.
- [RadioButton](./llms/RadioButton.md): Single radio option within a group.
- [RadioGroup](./llms/RadioGroup.md): Group of radio buttons with name, legend, and optional error.
- [RangeInput](./llms/RangeInput.md): Slider input for a numeric range (min/max/value).
- [Spinner](./llms/Spinner.md): Loading spinner with size.
- [Step](./llms/Step.md): Single step within a stepper (completed, error, warning, etc.).
- [Stepper](./llms/Stepper.md): Horizontal or vertical stepper with steps and optional click navigation.
- [TabStrip](./llms/TabStrip.md): Tabs with optional add-tab and compact style.
- [Table](./llms/Table.md): Data table with optional header variant, striped rows, and title bar.
- [Textarea](./llms/Textarea.md): Multi-line text input with placeholder and value.
- [TimePicker](./llms/TimePicker.md): Time-only picker with value and min/max.
- [Toggle](./llms/Toggle.md): On/off switch with size and optional label.
- [Tooltip](./llms/Tooltip.md): Hover or focus tooltip with text, position, and corner variant.
- [WeekPicker](./llms/WeekPicker.md): Week picker with value and min/max.

## Shell Components

- [LeftSidebar](./llms/LeftSidebar.md): Left-hand shell sidebar with optional variant and sections.
- [RightSidebar](./llms/RightSidebar.md): Right-hand shell sidebar with optional variant and sections.
- [ShellFooter](./llms/ShellFooter.md): Bottom shell area with tabs and optional “more” control.
- [ShellHeader](./llms/ShellHeader.md): Top shell bar with logo, product name, and optional company picker.
- [ShellLayout](./llms/ShellLayout.md): App shell that composes header, footer, sidebars, page header, and main content.
- [ShellPageHeader](./llms/ShellPageHeader.md): Page-level header with title, subtitle, and optional primary/outline buttons.
- [ShellPanel](./llms/ShellPanel.md): Slide-out panel from left or right with title and optional variant.

## Tokens and Theming

- [Tokens](./llms/tokens.md): CSS custom properties for spacing, colors, typography, elevation.
- [Themes](./llms/themes.md): Four themes (CP, VP, PPM, Maconomy) with light and dark modes.

## Optional

- [Form Controls](./llms/form-controls.md): Input, Textarea, NumberInput, Checkbox, RadioButton, Toggle, DateInput, Label.
- [Pickers](./llms/pickers.md): DatePicker, DateTimePicker, MonthPicker, WeekPicker, TimePicker, PickerPopup.
